text.title: Spec Examples Basic Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Spec Examples Basic.

example.scenario: An author adapts the 'CRUD feature' basic example for a notes-CRUD endpoint: keeps the AC layout, replaces persona, rewrites 5 AC, records archetype = crud, fields_adapted = 9, fields_kept = 2.
example.trace: r1-four-archetypes → r4-archetype-tag → r5-adapt-not-copy → r2-fully-realistic → artefact green
